TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ma-na-kwa "Si-pangn-ya a kamu, Managua(ma'na…£wa) nu Ni-cya-la-kwa angangangan a tukay atu saayaway nu tabakiay a tukay, nu Cong-mey a kitizaan nu sakatusa nu tabakiay a tukay. tini i Ni-cya-la-kwa a satipan atu Ni-cya-la-kwa nu sakatusa nu tabakiay a taku-Ma-na-kwa tuku a tukus. uyni a tukay i 1852 a mihcaan mapanutek tu nu Ni-cya-la-kwa angangan nu tukuy. ť¶¨ÁīćÁďú(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Managua(ma'na…£wa)) . nilaculan Ma-na-kwa a tademaw izaw ku 1,617,096 ku tademaw "2004 a mihcaan" zuma hatu u Si-pang-ya ku kamu nu May-s-ti-su a tademaw, caay kuni dada' izanay ku Si-li-ya a tademaw, Pa-le-s-ta a tademaw, Ya-mey-ni-ya a tademaw, Lipun a tademaw, Taywan a tademaw masaluyaluy mueneng. i lalangawan, Ma-na-kwa u singanganay nu Ni-cya-la-kwa itini ku hanu limaay a kamu. . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ni-cya-la-kwa ayaw nu kung-yen tu 12,00 a mihcaan izaw tu ku kasumamadanay a Ing-ti-an a tademaw mueneng, i Ma-na-kwa satip saamisan A-ka-wa-lin-ka a kitizaan 4 kung-li ku katanayu', laed ayaw pakala tu 6,000 a mihcaan naemekan masubelid i lanu'an nu abu. . Ma-na-kwa saayaway a waway Ke-lun-pi-ya ziday u mibutingay a ziyazu', 19819 a mihcaan tatenga tu mapangangan tu Leal Villa de Santiago de Managua han. Ni-cya-la-kwa Ii1838 a mihcaan mala takeday a kanatal, saayaway a Ke-la-na-ta atu Lyey-ang malaalaw tu Ni-cya-la-kwa a angangan a tukay caay ka sasulul. Ke-la-na-ta u mamecelay a daduducan, u Lyey-ang u pahuyanan a kakitizaan. Leal Villa de Santiago de Managua. . Ma-na-kwa i Lye-ang atu Ke-la-na-ta tusa a tukayayan lala'a tizaan mala u tatungusay a lala', namahiza, Ma-na-kwa i 1852 a mihcaan mapasingkiw uyni a kanatal u tatenga'ay tu a angangan nu tukay. makay 1852 a mihcaan panuteken tu tukay katukuh 1930 a mihcaan, Ma-na-kwa kalamkam malahad ku tukay, nika namahiza mapeci' nu kayadah nu satebuc. uyni a tukay i 1876 a muhcaan atu 1885 a m kihcaan namabalat, 1931 a mihcaan Ni-cya-la-kwa a nine latu 1936 a mihcaan tu tabakiay lamal malawpes tu kuyni a tukay tu hamin a kitizaan, zikuz i Ni-cya-la-kwa Cong-tungAn-nay-s-ta-si-aw.Su-mu-ca.Cya-ya a pikuwan hawsa, uyni a tukay muliyaw a patizang malingatu kalamkam malahad, i ayaw nu 1970 a mihcaan, Ma-na-kwa mala Cung-me-cow nu macakatay a tukuay. 1972 a mihcaan Ma-na-kwa muliyaw cumudan nu tabakiay a ninel, macaliway ku cacay emang ku mapatayay a tademaw, uyni a ninel atu 1980 a mihcaan labu nu kanganganyaw pihaceng kapeci' ku kalahad nu tukay, katukuh 1990 a mihcaan tu teban malingatu palekal. imahini Ma-na-kwa mahiza u angangan a kezay nu Ni-cya-la-kwa. Ni-cya-la-kwa tini i Ma-na-kwa a Taku tu timulan a tukus. takuay pasu atu sawali timulan a taku Ni-cya-la-kwa a taku-malecaday a butingan, caay ku zikuzay maazih nu nanumay a sa a buting dada'. takuay nanum makayzaay tu i 1927 a mihcaan baluhay a nipasisil tu nanum atu kinabakah a nanum tayza iLa-s-mey-say-te-s tu cacay Te-kow cen-bu nipiedap tu pilisimet tu mauningay a nanum a kusi, a palawpes tu mauningay. Ma-na-kwa nu Ni-cya-la-kwa kitizaan a lala' u sakapahay a tukay. Ni-cya-la-kwa hamin a angangan a zazan u sakayza i Ma-na-kwa, saaca sakacacubelis angangan nu tukay nu kapulungan macaluway ku miculuay, sakatayza i Ma-na-kwa angangan iza ku sepat a zazan. tukayay imahini nayi' aku silamalay nu miculu'ay, zayhan zikuz tu 1980 a mihcaan, Ni-cya-la-kwa nu silamalay la'tus tu a sanga'en caay tu ka cukaymasen. Aw-ku-s-tow.Say-sa-al.San-ti nuo "IATA bangngu, MGA, ICAObangngu, MNMG" nu Ni-cya-la-kwa masakaputay a kanatal angangan nu kanatal Ma-na-kow kitakit a pahikukian, nu Ma-na-kow atu Ni-cya-la-kwa kahenulan a pahikukian, uyni a kanatal a binacadan misatekeday nu mikeliday Aw-ku-s-tow.Say-sa-al.San-ti-nuo a nvgangan ku sapangangan. Ś•ßŚŹ§śĖĮśČė¬∑Ś°ěŤĖ©Áąĺ¬∑ś°ĎŚúįŤęĺ (IATAšĽ£ÁĘľ:MGAÔľõICAOšĽ£ÁĘľ:MNMG) . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ma-na-kwa "si-paŇčn-ja a kamu, managua(ma Ē~ °na*wa) nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa aŇčaŇčaŇčan a tukaj atu saajawaj nu tabakiaj a tukaj, nu ¶oŇč-m…ô a kitizaan nu sakatusa nu tabakiaj a tukaj. tini i ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa a satipan atu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa nu sakatusa nu tabakiaj a taku-ma-na-kwa tuku a tukus. ujni a tukaj i **** a mińß ¶aan mapanut…ôk tu nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa aŇčaŇčan nu tukuj. ***(****:managua(ma Ē~ °na*wa)) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ma-na-kwa a tad…ômaw izaw ku *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw "**** a mińß ¶aan" zuma ńßatu u si-paŇč-ja ku kamu nu maj-s-ti-su a tad…ômaw, ¶aaj kuni dada Ē~ ° izanaj ku si-r~…ĺi-ja a tad…ômaw, pa-r~…ĺ…ô-s-ta a tad…ômaw, ja-m…ô-ni-ja a tad…ômaw, r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw, tajwan a tad…ômaw masar~…ĺujar~…ĺuj mu…ôn…ôŇč. i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ma-na-kwa u siŇčaŇčanaj nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa itini ku ńßanu r~…ĺimaaj a kamu. . r~…ĺikisi** ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu **,** a mińß ¶aan izaw tu ku kasumamadanaj a iŇč-ti-an a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč, i ma-na-kwa satip saamisan a-ka-wa-r~…ĺin-ka a kitizaan * kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku katanaju Ē~ °, r~…ĺa…ôd ajaw pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** a mińß ¶aan na…ôm…ôkan masub…ôr~…ĺid i r~…ĺanu Ē~ °an nu abu. . ma-na-kwa saajawaj a wawaj k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja zidaj u mibutiŇčaj a zijazu Ē~ °, ***** a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇča tu mapaŇčaŇčan tu r~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺ *ir~…ĺr~…ĺa d…ô santiago d…ô managua ńßan. ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa ii**** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa tak…ôdaj a kanatar~…ĺ, saajawaj a k…ô-r~…ĺa-na-ta atu r~…ĺj…ô-aŇč mar~…ĺaar~…ĺaw tu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa a aŇčaŇčan a tukaj ¶aaj ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺ. k…ô-r~…ĺa-na-ta u mam…ô ¶…ôr~…ĺaj a dadudu ¶an, u r~…ĺj…ô-aŇč u pańßujanan a kakitizaan. r~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺ *ir~…ĺr~…ĺa d…ô santiago d…ô managua. . ma-na-kwa i r~…ĺj…ô-aŇč atu k…ô-r~…ĺa-na-ta tusa a tukajajan r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °a tizaan mar~…ĺa u tatuŇčusaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, namańßiza, ma-na-kwa i **** a mińß ¶aan mapasiŇčkiw ujni a kanatar~…ĺ u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan panut…ôk…ôn tu tukaj katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ma-na-kwa kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad ku tukaj, nika namańßiza map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu kajadańß nu sat…ôbu ¶. ujni a tukaj i **** a muńß ¶aan atu **** a m kińß ¶aan namabar~…ĺat, **** a mińß ¶aan ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa a nin…ô r~…ĺatu **** a mińß ¶aan tu tabakiaj r~…ĺamar~…ĺ mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kujni a tukaj tu ńßamin a kitizaan, zikuz i ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa ¶oŇč-tuŇčan-naj-s-ta-si-aw.su-mu- ¶a. ¶ja-ja a pikuwan ńßawsa, ujni a tukaj mur~…ĺijaw a patizaŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad, i ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶aan, ma-na-kwa mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-m…ô- ¶ow nu ma ¶akataj a tukuaj. **** a mińß ¶aan ma-na-kwa mur~…ĺijaw ¶umudan nu tabakiaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku ¶a ¶aj …ômaŇč ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, ujni a nin…ôr~…ĺ atu **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺabu nu kaŇčaŇčanjaw pińßa ¶…ôŇč kap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺańßad nu tukaj, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan tu t…ôban mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. imańßini ma-na-kwa mańßiza u aŇčaŇčan a k…ôzaj nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa. ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa tini i ma-na-kwa a taku tu timur~…ĺan a tukus. takuaj pasu atu sawar~…ĺi timur~…ĺan a taku ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa a taku-mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a butiŇčan, ¶aaj ku zikuzaj maazińß nu nanumaj a sa a butiŇč dada Ē~ °. takuaj nanum makajzaaj tu i **** a mińß ¶aan bar~…ĺuńßaj a nipasisir~…ĺ tu nanum atu kinabakańß a nanum tajza ir~…ĺa-s-m…ô-saj-t…ô-s tu ¶a ¶aj t…ô-kow ¶…ôn-bu nipi…ôdap tu pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu mauniŇčaj a nanum a kusi, a par~…ĺawp…ôs tu mauniŇčaj. ma-na-kwa nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa kitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u sakapańßaj a tukaj. ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa ńßamin a aŇčaŇčan a zazan u sakajza i ma-na-kwa, saa ¶a saka ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan ma ¶ar~…ĺuwaj ku mi ¶ur~…ĺuaj, sakatajza i ma-na-kwa aŇčaŇčan iza ku s…ôpat a zazan. tukajaj imańßini naji Ē~ ° aku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj, zajńßan zikuz tu **** a mińß ¶aan, ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus tu a saŇča Ē~ °…ôn ¶aaj tu ka ¶ukajmas…ôn. aw-ku-s-tow.saj-sa-ar~…ĺ.san-ti nuo "iata baŇčŇču, mga, i ¶aobaŇčŇču, mnmg" nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa masakaputaj a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ ma-na-kow kitakit a pańßikukian, nu ma-na-kow atu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa kańß…ônur~…ĺan a pańßikukian, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan misat…ôk…ôdaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj aw-ku-s-tow.saj-sa-ar~…ĺ.san-ti-nuo a n*gaŇčan ku sapaŇčaŇčan. ************ (iata**:mga*i ¶ao**:mnmg) . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ma-na-kwa "Si-pangn-ya a kamu, Managua(ma'na…£wa) nu Ni-cya-la-kwa angangangan a tukay atu saayaway nu tabakiay a tukay, nu Cong-mey a kitizaan nu sakatusa nu tabakiay a tukay. tini i Ni-cya-la-kwa a satipan atu Ni-cya-la-kwa nu sakatusa nu tabakiay a taku-Ma-na-kwa tuku a tukus. uyni a tukay i 1852 a mihcaan mapanutek tu nu Ni-cya-la-kwa angangan nu tukuy. ť¶¨ÁīćÁďú(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Managua(ma'na…£wa)) . nilaculan Ma-na-kwa a tademaw izaw ku 1,617,096 ku tademaw "2004 a mihcaan" zuma hatu u Si-pang-ya ku kamu nu May-s-ti-su a tademaw, caay kuni dada' izanay ku Si-li-ya a tademaw, Pa-le-s-ta a tademaw, Ya-mey-ni-ya a tademaw, Lipun a tademaw, Taywan a tademaw masaluyaluy mueneng. i lalangawan, Ma-na-kwa u singanganay nu Ni-cya-la-kwa itini ku hanu limaay a kamu. . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ni-cya-la-kwa ayaw nu kung-yen tu 12,00 a mihcaan izaw tu ku kasumamadanay a Ing-ti-an a tademaw mueneng, i Ma-na-kwa satip saamisan A-ka-wa-lin-ka a kitizaan 4 kung-li ku katanayu', laed ayaw pakala tu 6,000 a mihcaan naemekan masubelid i lanu'an nu abu. . Ma-na-kwa saayaway a waway Ke-lun-pi-ya ziday u mibutingay a ziyazu', 19819 a mihcaan tatenga tu mapangangan tu Leal Villa de Santiago de Managua han. Ni-cya-la-kwa Ii1838 a mihcaan mala takeday a kanatal, saayaway a Ke-la-na-ta atu Lyey-ang malaalaw tu Ni-cya-la-kwa a angangan a tukay caay ka sasulul. Ke-la-na-ta u mamecelay a daduducan, u Lyey-ang u pahuyanan a kakitizaan. Leal Villa de Santiago de Managua. . Ma-na-kwa i Lye-ang atu Ke-la-na-ta tusa a tukayayan lala'a tizaan mala u tatungusay a lala', namahiza, Ma-na-kwa i 1852 a mihcaan mapasingkiw uyni a kanatal u tatenga'ay tu a angangan nu tukay. makay 1852 a mihcaan panuteken tu tukay katukuh 1930 a mihcaan, Ma-na-kwa kalamkam malahad ku tukay, nika namahiza mapeci' nu kayadah nu satebuc. uyni a tukay i 1876 a muhcaan atu 1885 a m kihcaan namabalat, 1931 a mihcaan Ni-cya-la-kwa a nine latu 1936 a mihcaan tu tabakiay lamal malawpes tu kuyni a tukay tu hamin a kitizaan, zikuz i Ni-cya-la-kwa Cong-tungAn-nay-s-ta-si-aw.Su-mu-ca.Cya-ya a pikuwan hawsa, uyni a tukay muliyaw a patizang malingatu kalamkam malahad, i ayaw nu 1970 a mihcaan, Ma-na-kwa mala Cung-me-cow nu macakatay a tukuay. 1972 a mihcaan Ma-na-kwa muliyaw cumudan nu tabakiay a ninel, macaliway ku cacay emang ku mapatayay a tademaw, uyni a ninel atu 1980 a mihcaan labu nu kanganganyaw pihaceng kapeci' ku kalahad nu tukay, katukuh 1990 a mihcaan tu teban malingatu palekal. imahini Ma-na-kwa mahiza u angangan a kezay nu Ni-cya-la-kwa. Ni-cya-la-kwa tini i Ma-na-kwa a Taku tu timulan a tukus. takuay pasu atu sawali timulan a taku Ni-cya-la-kwa a taku-malecaday a butingan, caay ku zikuzay maazih nu nanumay a sa a buting dada'. takuay nanum makayzaay tu i 1927 a mihcaan baluhay a nipasisil tu nanum atu kinabakah a nanum tayza iLa-s-mey-say-te-s tu cacay Te-kow cen-bu nipiedap tu pilisimet tu mauningay a nanum a kusi, a palawpes tu mauningay. Ma-na-kwa nu Ni-cya-la-kwa kitizaan a lala' u sakapahay a tukay. Ni-cya-la-kwa hamin a angangan a zazan u sakayza i Ma-na-kwa, saaca sakacacubelis angangan nu tukay nu kapulungan macaluway ku miculuay, sakatayza i Ma-na-kwa angangan iza ku sepat a zazan. tukayay imahini nayi' aku silamalay nu miculu'ay, zayhan zikuz tu 1980 a mihcaan, Ni-cya-la-kwa nu silamalay la'tus tu a sanga'en caay tu ka cukaymasen. Aw-ku-s-tow.Say-sa-al.San-ti nuo "IATA bangngu, MGA, ICAObangngu, MNMG" nu Ni-cya-la-kwa masakaputay a kanatal angangan nu kanatal Ma-na-kow kitakit a pahikukian, nu Ma-na-kow atu Ni-cya-la-kwa kahenulan a pahikukian, uyni a kanatal a binacadan misatekeday nu mikeliday Aw-ku-s-tow.Say-sa-al.San-ti-nuo a nvgangan ku sapangangan. Ś•ßŚŹ§śĖĮśČė¬∑Ś°ěŤĖ©Áąĺ¬∑ś°ĎŚúįŤęĺ (IATAšĽ£ÁĘľ:MGAÔľõICAOšĽ£ÁĘľ:MNMG) . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶…ôr~…ĺaj a dadudu ¶an, u r~…ĺj…ô-aŇč u pańßujanan a kakitizaan. r~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺ *ir~…ĺr~…ĺa d…ô santiago d…ô managua. . ma-na-kwa i r~…ĺj…ô-aŇč atu k…ô-r~…ĺa-na-ta tusa a tukajajan r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °a tizaan mar~…ĺa u tatuŇčusaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, namańßiza, ma-na-kwa i **** a mińß ¶aan mapasiŇčkiw ujni a kanatar~…ĺ u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan panut…ôk…ôn tu tukaj katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ma-na-kwa kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad ku tukaj, nika namańßiza map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu kajadańß nu sat…ôbu ¶. ujni a tukaj i **** a muńß ¶aan atu **** a m kińß ¶aan namabar~…ĺat, **** a mińß ¶aan ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa a nin…ô r~…ĺatu **** a mińß ¶aan tu tabakiaj r~…ĺamar~…ĺ mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kujni a tukaj tu ńßamin a kitizaan, zikuz i ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa ¶oŇč-tuŇčan-naj-s-ta-si-aw.su-mu- ¶a. ¶ja-ja a pikuwan ńßawsa, ujni a tukaj mur~…ĺijaw a patizaŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad, i ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶aan, ma-na-kwa mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-m…ô- ¶ow nu ma ¶akataj a tukuaj. **** a mińß ¶aan ma-na-kwa mur~…ĺijaw ¶umudan nu tabakiaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku ¶a ¶aj …ômaŇč ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, ujni a nin…ôr~…ĺ atu **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺabu nu kaŇčaŇčanjaw pińßa ¶…ôŇč kap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺańßad nu tukaj, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan tu t…ôban mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. imańßini ma-na-kwa mańßiza u aŇčaŇčan a k…ôzaj nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa. ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa tini i ma-na-kwa a taku tu timur~…ĺan a tukus. takuaj pasu atu sawar~…ĺi timur~…ĺan a taku ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa a taku-mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a butiŇčan, ¶aaj ku zikuzaj maazińß nu nanumaj a sa a butiŇč dada Ē~ °. takuaj nanum makajzaaj tu i **** a mińß ¶aan bar~…ĺuńßaj a nipasisir~…ĺ tu nanum atu kinabakańß a nanum tajza ir~…ĺa-s-m…ô-saj-t…ô-s tu ¶a ¶aj t…ô-kow ¶…ôn-bu nipi…ôdap tu pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu mauniŇčaj a nanum a kusi, a par~…ĺawp…ôs tu mauniŇčaj. ma-na-kwa nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa kitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u sakapańßaj a tukaj. ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa ńßamin a aŇčaŇčan a zazan u sakajza i ma-na-kwa, saa ¶a saka ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan ma ¶ar~…ĺuwaj ku mi ¶ur~…ĺuaj, sakatajza i ma-na-kwa aŇčaŇčan iza ku s…ôpat a zazan. tukajaj imańßini naji Ē~ ° aku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj, zajńßan zikuz tu **** a mińß ¶aan, ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus tu a saŇča Ē~ °…ôn ¶aaj tu ka ¶ukajmas…ôn. aw-ku-s-tow.saj-sa-ar~…ĺ.san-ti nuo "iata baŇčŇču, mga, i ¶aobaŇčŇču, mnmg" nu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa masakaputaj a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ ma-na-kow kitakit a pańßikukian, nu ma-na-kow atu ni- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa kańß…ônur~…ĺan a pańßikukian, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan misat…ôk…ôdaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj aw-ku-s-tow.saj-sa-ar~…ĺ.san-ti-nuo a n*gaŇčan ku sapaŇčaŇčan. ************ (iata**:mga*i ¶ao**:mnmg) . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
